articles.title: Fisherman found drowned in Sungai Besut
articles.summary: JERTIH: A fisherman was found drowned after he is believed to have fallen into Sungai Besut near Agro Darau in Kampung Darau, Hulu Besut, near here on Sunday (March 29). Read full story

articles.title: Hot weather threatens over 13,000 hectares of Perak padi fields
articles.summary: IPOH: Padi fields in the Seberang Perak and Sungai Manik irrigation schemes in the Perak Tengah and Hilir Perak districts have been affected by the current hot weather. Read full story

articles.title: Two held in murder probe after charred body found in Kulim
